panels.description: The time taken after receiving the raw block from DA through State Transition Function and committing to the database
panels.title: Runner loop times

panels.description:
How much time does it take to process slot, split by following stages:

1. blob_selection
2. begin_hooks
3. blobs_processing
4. end_hooks
5. finalization
panels.title: Slot Processing Times

panels.description: The time taken to fetch the block from the Data Availability layer
panels.title: Fetch Data Availability block time

panels.description:
Time it takes to process single transaction.
Does not include signature check
panels.title: Transaction Processing Time

panels.description: Distance from synced DA height to the head DA height.
panels.title: Sync Distance

panels.description: Distance from synced DA height to the head DA height.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "sov-rollup")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop:v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) =>
    r._measurement == "sov_rollup_runner_da" and
    r._field == "da_height"
  )
  |> derivative(unit: 1s, nonNegative: true)

panels.title: Processed DA Slots per second

panels.description: How many batches processed at given time
panels.title: Batches Processed

targets.query:
from(bucket: "sov-rollup")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop:v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) =>
    r._measurement == "sov_rollup_runner_counts" and r._field == "batches_c"
  )
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, _value: float(v: r._value)}))
  |> cumulativeSum()

panels.description: How many batches processed at given time
